user.title: Add a PollenWatch location
user.description: Pollen data comes from the Copernicus Atmosphere Monitoring Service (CAMS) via Open-Meteo and covers Europe. The location is fixed once set — to move it later, remove and re-add the integration.

data_description.location: Pick the point to monitor. Open-Meteo snaps it to the nearest ~10 km grid cell.
data_description.allergens: Which pollen species to create sensors for.

error.out_of_coverage: This location is outside CAMS European coverage. Choose a location within Europe.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Open-Meteo. Check your connection and try again.

init.title: PollenWatch options
init.description: The location is fixed; remove and re-add the integration to change it.

data_description.update_interval: How often to poll Open-Meteo. Minimum 60 minutes to be a good citizen on a free public API.
data_description.enable_polleninformation: Adds a second source. Requires a free API key from polleninformation.at.
data_description.country: The country whose pollen network covers your location.
data_description.api_key: Stored encrypted in Home Assistant; never written to disk in plain text.
data_description.enable_dwd: Adds the Deutscher Wetterdienst forecast. Germany only; no API key needed.
data_description.region: Your DWD forecast region within Germany.
data_description.enable_meteoswiss: Adds the MeteoSwiss automatic network. Switzerland only; no API key. The nearest measuring station is picked automatically — currently: {ms_station}.
data_description.enable_epin: Adds the ePIN automatic network. Bavaria only; no API key. The nearest measuring station is picked automatically — currently: {epin_station}.
data_description.enable_google: Adds the Google Pollen API: global coverage, 5-day forecast, all six allergens (incl. olive — the only source with it). Requires a Google Cloud project with the Pollen API enabled AND a billing account attached. A free tier exists (~5,000 requests/month) but Google requires a payment method on file, so this is more involved than the other sources' free keys.
data_description.google_api_key: Stored encrypted in Home Assistant; never written to disk in plain text. Consensus-only: Google's licence forbids storing its forecasts, so it is not used for the recent-percentile baseline.

error.country_required: Select a country to enable polleninformation.
error.api_key_required: Enter the API key for the source you enabled.
error.invalid_api_key: The source rejected the API key. Check it and try again.
error.out_of_coverage: The selected source has no pollen data for this location.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the selected pollen source. Check your connection and try again.
error.region_required: Select a DWD region to enable DWD.
